title: fix: remove 'Pollen tier compatible' from news banner
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Tidying the dashboard
gist.blurb: A quick sweep of the dashboard to keep our news banner clean and concise.
gist.summary: Removed redundant text from the dashboard's news banner for a cleaner UI.
gist.impact: Users will see a more streamlined and concise news banner on the dashboard.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a caretaker, dusting off a digital billboard or signboard to make it clean and readable.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny caretaker's apron, using a small feather duster to clean a glowing retro digital billboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
